scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @whatsapp-sender/api" "npm run dev -w @whatsapp-sender/worker" "npm run dev -w @whatsapp-sender/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @whatsapp-sender/contracts && npm run build -w @whatsapp-sender/database && npm run build -w @whatsapp-sender/api && npm run build -w @whatsapp-sender/worker && npm run build -w @whatsapp-sender/web
